author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #19 is confirmed! Join us this Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!  

The Atlas Brew is a Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel   

This week we are talking about METAVERSE POLITICS! How will multi-faction guilds work once SCREAM starts? How will SCREAM re-shape alliances in Star Atlas? How are factions currently moving behind the scenes? Faction Propaganda: The beginning of a new trend?  
 
See you all on Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!

Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/990995890045059083
